articles.title: 5.7-magnitude earthquake jolts Islamabad, parts of KP: PMD
articles.description: Tremors were felt in Islamabad and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa on Monday as an earthquake of 5.7 magnitude struck the Afghanistan-Tajikistan border region, the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) said. In a statement, the PMD said the quake was recorded at 11:46am. It added that the epicentre was located near Afghanistan’s border with Tajikistan and had a depth of 170 kilometres. According to PMD, jolts from the earthquake were felt in Islamabad, Swat, Shangla and Buner. However, the United States Geological Survey (USGS) recorded the earthquake’s magnitude as 5.1 on the Richter scale, with its epicentre having a depth of 105.1km. Residents of Islamabad and KP had last felt earthquake tremors on April 3, when an earthquake of 6.1 magnitude hit the Hindu Kush Region in Afghanistan. Earlier this month, Balochistan also witnessed two quakes . Pakistan falls on three major tectonic plates — the Arabian, Euro-Asian and Indian — which create five seismic zones under the country. The intersection of multiple fault lines means that tectonic movements remain a frequent occurrence in the region.

articles.title: Palace: Gov't prepared for El Niño
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — Concerned government agencies are prepared for the looming El Niño phenomenon, Malacañang said Monday. The Department of Agriculture (DA) last Friday warned of the possibility of a “super” El Niño toward the end of 2026. READ: Agriculture officials fear ‘super’ El Niño “El Niño is something we have already experienced—it is not new—so the DA is prepared with concrete measures to mitigate its effects. The National Irrigation Administration has been instructed to further identify areas that will be affected by water shortages, including those covered by systems such as Magat, UPRIIS, and other irrigation systems,” Palace Press [...]... Keep on reading: Palace: Gov't prepared for El Niño

articles.title: Horoscope for Monday, April 27, 2026
articles.description:
Moon Alert

Caution! Avoid shopping (except for food and gas) and important decisions all day after 6 a.m. The moon is in Virgo.

Aries (March 21-April 19)

An average day

With your ruler Mars in your sign, you have lots of energy! Plus, you're chatty because Mercury (the planet of communications) is also in Aries. However, today in particular, you might have to lend your efforts to help someone else. (Hey — what goes around, comes around.)

Taurus (April 20-May 20)

A positive day

You love good wine, good food, good sex and a nice place to live — and today you might come close to fulfilling your dreams. This is a strong day for you because the moon is in your fellow Earth sign. Enjoy socializing with others. Sports and fun activities with kids will please.

Gemini (May 21-June 20)

An average day

Today is the perfect day to relax at home and play things low-key. You might be involved with a female family member more than usual. Your ability to be charming and diplomatic will be timely. Take note that this is a good week to buy wardrobe items for yourself.

Cancer (June 21-July 22)

A positive day

Enjoy time with a friend, as well as interacting with groups and organizations today. What you do now might make a difference because your ambition is strong and you’re prepared to speak up for what you want.

Leo (July 23-Aug. 22)

An average day

With the sun at the top of your chart now, you look wonderful to others. In fact, they see you as super competent and capable. Meanwhile, today you're thinking about your values and what really matters. The Dalai Lama said, "The purpose of life is to be happy."

Virgo (Aug. 23-Sept. 22)

A positive day

Today the moon is in your sign, which makes you a tad more emotional than usual. However, it will also slightly increase your good luck over all the other signs. Oh yes. You might even test this by asking the universe for a favor. Why not?

Libra (Sept. 23-Oct. 22)

An average day

Be patient with others because fiery Mars is opposite your sign, which can make you feel irritated with others. (They’re probably annoying.) Fortunately, you are the epitome of diplomacy, which is getting what you want while everyone keeps smiling.

Scorpio (Oct. 23-Nov. 21)

A positive day

Remember that you need more sleep this week. Don't be down on yourself if you sleep late. Fortunately, both Mercury and Mars are spurring you to work and accomplish what you want. Today is a good day to share your hopes and dreams for the future with someone to get their feedback. Try it.

Sagittarius (Nov. 22-Dec. 21)

An average day

Once again, people notice you more than usual, and yes, some will know personal details about your private life. Fortunately, relations with those who are close to you are cozy and supportive. Look for ways to feel happy!

Capricorn (Dec. 22-Jan. 19)

A positive day

Do something different today. As this week begins, you're eager for a bit of adventure and stimulation. Travel or a chance to see new places and meet new faces will please you. (You might do this in your own neighborhood, your own city, or from afar.)

Aquarius (Jan. 20-Feb. 18)

An average day

Home and family are your focus right now. You're keen to socialize, and romance is encouraging. Short trips and chances to learn new things and talk to new people will inspire you. The moon will steer you to details related to shared property, inheritances, taxes and debt.

Pisces (Feb. 19-March 20)

An average day

Today you have to go more than halfway when dealing with others because the moon is opposite your sign. You'll find this easy to do, especially with family members, because relationships are warm and supportive. Respect your moneymaking ideas!

If today is your birthday

Actress Sally Hawkins (1976) shares your birthday today. You are reflective, thoughtful and sensitive. You're also self-reliant and independent. Exciting changes will bring you increased personal freedom this year. Stay flexible. Let go of things that have held you back. Seek new opportunities and be ready to act fast. Expect to travel.
